subcodes.first_line: O thou who art triumphant in submission and contentment, O honoured Ghulám-Riḍá! Though in the path of faithfulness thou didst taste the bitterness of cruelty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موفق بتسلیم و رضا حضرت غلامرضا هر چند در سبیل وفا تلخی جفا چشیدی و در دست
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
